name: Black Lotus Extract
description:
Black lotus extract causes severe internal bleeding.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and Drained 1 (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage and Drained 1 (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage and Drained 2 (1 round)
